recentTweets.text: Six years ago today, my parishioner, my mentor, and my hero, John Lewis, transitioned into ancestorhood. May God bless the memory of the boy from Troy, and may we all continue getting into good trouble. https://t.co/6iVfsXlIRR
I will vote NO on Attorney General nominee Todd Blanche. The President’s personal lawyer cannot also be the country’s lawyer.
Pete Hegseth is completely off the rails. He needs to be fired immediately.
Why is Trump still focused on 2020? It’s so he can create the pretext to interfere in 2026. https://t.co/DJ43rJaIc2
Staying in power matters more to Donald Trump than anything else. https://t.co/ePDzXc6lrM
This is what I'll be focused on. https://t.co/ncjKCG1Uau

Donald Trump has used the presidency to make BILLIONS of dollars.

And he wants to talk about fraud?

Donald Trump has already tried to redraw the maps and change the rules of our elections to tilt the playing field in his favor.

When he can't win by the rules, he tries to change them.

In America, the people choose their leaders.

Not the other way around.

ICE is still gunning people down in our streets. It is a moral tragedy that this has become commonplace in our country. 

Do not let anyone convince you that it has to be this way. This is a choice.
Some good news. https://t.co/FYJU0BMd8z

I don't believe that Donald Trump believes in much of anything. 
  
For him, religion is just one more tool in his toolbox to divide us.

I am deeply saddened by the passing of my colleague, Senator Lindsey Graham. He was a man of great faith who served the people of South Carolina with passion and tenacity. I am praying for his family and his loved ones as they mourn this tremendous loss.

Congress FINALLY did something to make housing more affordable. 

But Trump threw a temper tantrum and wouldn’t sign it. 

Too bad. 

The bill passed 85-5. So it became law anyway. ✅🏠

It's official. 

My provision banning private equity from mass purchasing homes is now law. 

This is an INCREDIBLE victory for Georgia and the country.

GOOD NEWS:

Even though Trump refuses to sign my provision banning private equity from mass purchasing homes, it will become law TONIGHT.

Homes for people, not corporations.

My mother grew up in Georgia picking somebody else’s cotton. 
 
The hands that once picked somebody else’s cotton got to pick her son to be a United States senator. 
 
That’s why voting rights are personal to me. We’ve come too far to go backward.

RFK Jr. is a danger to our health.

If he's not fired, he ought to have the decency to resign.

Grateful to join fans from around the world at the World Cup match in Atlanta yesterday. It was great to see my colleague, Congressman Austin Scott, there too.

Moments like these remind us that, no matter where we come from or what team we're cheering for, our shared humanity is https://t.co/bR8VWMRJun
Donald Trump is the most corrupt president in our nation's history.

Pete Hegseth is unhinged and unqualified.

He should be fired.

It was an honor to meet current and former law enforcement today at the Peachtree Road Race and thank them for their service to our community. Thank you to all the law enforcement working on this holiday to keep us all safe. https://t.co/XChvgfdGP1
Making new friends at the Peachtree Road Race this morning. 🐶 https://t.co/FTI18tifvA
Starting off Independence Day right at the Peachtree Road Race. Happy 4th everyone! 🏃🏾👟🍑🇺🇸 https://t.co/Lz9jJ7h02p

On our nation's 250th birthday, I am reminded of how blessed we are to live in these United States.

American greatness lies in our ability to push forward in pursuit of our highest ideals. We must never stop fighting for liberty and justice for all.

Stay safe and have a great

Donald Trump has turned the White House into his personal piggy bank.
 
He is profiting off of the presidency.

This administration is literally taking food away from hungry people so Trump can help his billionaire buddies.

It's robin hood in reverse.
I want America to win. https://t.co/2cen7UCKQd

This is important. 

The Supreme Court has ruled that states CAN count mail ballots that are sent by Election Day but arrive late.

Small but significant victory in our battle against this administration’s all out war against your right to vote.

Donald Trump spent millions of YOUR money on no-bid contracts for his failed reflecting pool project.

Talk about waste, fraud, and abuse.

Donald Trump is blatantly corrupt. 
  
He has abused the public trust and must be held to account.
The SAVE Act isn't a voter identification bill; it's a voter suppression bill.

Donald Trump has only made your life MORE expensive. 
  
It's been nearly two years, and his administration is still blaming Joe Biden!

The President is holding this housing bill hostage in a desperate attempt to jam through his voter suppression law. 

President Trump, enough with the games. 

Sign the bill. https://t.co/di00o7mkGY

The Supreme Court's decision on TPS is a devastating blow for hundreds of thousands of law-abiding immigrants who have built their lives and contributed to their communities in the United States as fathers, mothers, teachers, nurses, doctors, researchers, business owners, and
When Donald Trump tells you the economy is doing well, he means it's doing well for people like Elon Musk.
Touching the reflecting pool sends you to prison for 10 years, but assaulting a police officer on January 6th gets you a pardon?
Donald Trump’s economy is a moral abomination. https://t.co/YkncMwXQem

The President is refusing to sign my provision to ban private equity from mass-purchasing homes.

He's trying to use it as leverage to jam through his voter suppression bill.

When authoritarians feel their grip on power slipping, they start pulling stunts like this.

Four years ago, the Supreme Court struck down Roe v. Wade, taking the right of choice away from millions of women.

I'll always work to ensure women have the right to make their own health care decisions.

A doctor’s office is too small for a woman, her doctor, and the

Good news this week.

When we raise our voices together, there is no limit to what we can accomplish. Even in times as dark as these. https://t.co/Aw8FFic55g

I’m deeply saddened to learn of the passing of Martha Zoller. I enjoyed our conversations across the years and deeply respected her commitment to her convictions and her community.  Honored to pray with her several weeks ago, I am now praying for her family, friends, and all who

We can’t lose sight of the cruel reality that Donald Trump has created in this country. 

He has stripped health care away from millions.
Taken food away from millions of hungry families.
And made virtually everything more expensive.

Fatherhood is a gift that I’m thankful for every day. 
 
The only thing I love more than being Georgia’s Senator and a pastor is being Chloé and Caleb’s dad. Happy Father’s Day!

Part of how we love our country is telling the truth about our story.  
 
America's story is one of extraordinary progress and painful injustice.  
 
We dishonor both when we pretend only one is true.

Republicans in Washington are spending $70 billion MORE on ICE while so many across this country can’t even afford to put food on the table.  
 
We don’t suffer from a poverty of resources in this country.  
 
We suffer from a lack of moral imagination.

Happy Juneteenth! 161 years ago today, the last enslaved people in Galveston, Texas were finally freed. Let us celebrate our ancestors’ strength and resilience, and remind ourselves of the work we still have to do to create the future they dreamed of.

This is huge.

For months, I have been working to stop the construction of a massive 10,000-person ICE facility in Social Circle, Georgia. 

We just learned DHS is cancelling it.

The power of the people is always more powerful than the people in power.
Homes should be for people, not corporations. https://t.co/DPgTcGwSXc

ICE is already larger than the Marines. And Republicans in Washington are trying to give them even MORE money.

What if we funded health care instead?

11 years ago, a violent act against the faith community took the lives of nine worshippers at Mother Emanuel AME Church in Charleston. May God bless their memory. We must continue our fight to end racism and hate in every form.
Donald Trump is a failed president and an unabashed warmonger. https://t.co/AJ3Sx7R7r8

War. Corruption. Devastation.

When will enough be enough? https://t.co/kg9agksiAh

This President has pardoned DOZENS of people convicted of fraud related crimes.  
 
The waste, fraud, and abuse comes straight from the top.

14 years ago, DACA was established to provide protection and safety for young people who came here as children and know no other home.   
   
Dreamers are under attack by the President. Congress must create a pathway to citizenship for Dreamers and fix our broken immigration

Additional funds for ICE: $70 billion  
Cost to end homelessness for nearly 8 years: $70 billion 
 
We don’t suffer from a poverty of resources. We suffer from a lack of moral imagination.

We cannot lose sight of this.  
 
Corrupt insiders are profiting off of the Iran War.  
 
There is absolutely NO excuse for war profiteering like this. 
 
Those responsible MUST be held to account.
Donald Trump is the most corrupt president this country has ever had.

Republicans in Washington are jamming through $70 billion more for ICE.  
 
Here’s what that money could have funded instead:  
 
-Universal pre-k for 2 years  
-2 years of free child care for 1 million+ children  
-Doubling the Pell Grant  
-The entire annual cost of groceries
If this isn't corruption, I don't know what is. https://t.co/UzC0ClzARW

A vote is a kind of prayer for the world we desire for ourselves and for our children.

These are the priorities of our President.

The Voting Rights Act of 1965 is the crown jewel of the Civil Rights Movement.

People literally died fighting for it.

Trump's Supreme Court is playing with the blood of our ancestors.

82 years ago, the beaches of Normandy were stormed by thousands of brave servicemembers to wipe fascism from the face of the earth. May we honor their courage and the sacrifice they made in defense of our freedoms.

The American people deserve to know how many have lost coverage. 

Washington Republicans voted it down. 

Why are they so afraid of transparency?

I just voted to block Trump's $1.8 billion slush fund.

Your tax dollars should not be going to January 6th rioters and the President's buddies.

It's corruption to the highest degree.

All they have left is blame and deflection. They know their agenda has failed.

For themselves and for their friends.
